CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(sugati__TAS_Travel_App__c, 'Vamoos'), HYPERLINK(sugati__TAS_Travel_App_Link__c, 'Review on Vamoos','_blank'), IF( ISPICKVAL(sugati__TAS_Travel_App__c, 'Axus'), HYPERLINK(sugati__TAS_Travel_App_Link__c, 'Review on Axus','_blank'), '' ) )
CustomField.label: Link To Travel App
